title: mentha × verticillata var. rivalis
intro: Mentha × verticillata var. rivalis, also known as Corsican mint, is a natural hybrid of mint plants that is native to the Mediterranean region. This plant is prized for its medicinal properties, which include being a natural anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antibacterial agent. The health benefits of Mentha × verticillata var. rivalis include relief from digestive issues, reduced stress and anxiety, and improved respiratory health. The plant can be used in various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal and health benefits.
